title: Lists
source_outline: Creating and indexing: positive and negative indexing
Slicing with step: a[::2], a[::-1], a[1:5:2]
Updating items and mutability: in-place modification; mutability demonstrated
List methods: append, insert, remove, pop, extend, index, count, clear
Looping through a list: for-loop iteration
Sorting: sort() vs sorted(); reverse and key= arguments
List comprehension: mapping and filtering in one expression

artifact_plan.profile_note: Intrinsic signal deep (8 sub-concepts, richest/first topic of P3); human confirmed deep at HITL#2. Corpus 2470w supports a deep 1800-2200w reading without padding (same path as week-1 1.2/1.4).
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: List index/slice figure: the elements in a row of cells with positive indices 0..n-1 above and negative -1..-n below, plus a highlighted slice window (e.g. a[1:5:2] with step). Genuinely spatial.

next_assessment.title: Data Structures Portfolio
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can choose and manipulate the right Python data structure for a given data-handling task.
